# Project Brief

## Project name
FamilyCo

## One-line pitch
FamilyCo is an operating platform where a Founder manages a company made of AI Agents that can plan, delegate, execute, ask for approval, and report results.

## Product vision
Help a Founder run a company by giving goals instead of micromanaging tasks.
The system should turn founder intent into structured work while preserving control, visibility, and budget awareness.

## Primary user
Founder

## Secondary users
- Future internal operators or executive assistants.
- System-created agents acting as employees.

## Core promise
The Founder gives a directive.
The Executive Agent interprets it, creates a plan, creates or updates projects and tasks, assigns work to agents, requests approval when needed, and returns outcomes.

## Main modules
- Chat
- Agent Management
- Project Management
- Task Management
- Inbox / Approvals
- Audit Log
- Budget
- Skills
- Settings

## Product editions
### Desktop
Main cockpit for the Founder. Best experience. Deepest feature coverage.

### Server
Runtime and orchestration layer. Runs agent workflows, queueing, scheduling, budget metering, and audit logging.

### Web
Lightweight operational surface for review, approvals, reporting, and monitoring.

## Key product principles
- Founder-first UX.
- AI should reduce coordination work.
- Every important AI action must be inspectable.
- Ambiguous or risky actions must request approval.
- Budget usage must be visible.
- Skills must be switchable.
- The system must feel like operating a company, not a generic chat app.

## Non-goals for v1
- Marketplace for public skills.
- Multi-tenant enterprise org hierarchy beyond one company.
- Human employee management outside Founder.
- Billing and subscription system.
- Fine-grained RBAC for many human roles.
